query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Using the FERC eLibrary AdvancedSearch tool for filings authored by Google between **June 1, 2024 and December 31, 2024**, I found **5 Google-submitted filings** with the following docket numbers:

| Filed date | Filing title / description | Docket number(s) |
|---|---|---|
| 06/28/2024 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-468-005** |
| 09/19/2024 | Doc-less Motion to Intervene of Google LLC | **ER24-2891-000; ER24-2888-000; ER24-2890-000; ER24-2893-000; ER24-2894-000; ER24-2889-000** |
| 11/05/2024 | Supplement to Notice of Change in Status of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-011** |
| 12/10/2024 | Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC | **AD24-11-000** |
| 12/27/2024 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-012** |

**Source:** FERC eLibrary AdvancedSearch API via `search_ferc_dockets`, searched 2024-06-01 to 2024-12-31, keyword “Google,” author affiliation “Google.”
